Off Calendar Sep-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Kritzer of Spiwak & Iezza (805.777.1175) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party
Gordon Greenwood of Kazan McClain Abrams Lyons & Greenwood (510.302.1000) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOSEPHINE HAYWOOD'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S AUGUST 7, 2008 ORDER. Plaintiff to return money to defendant forthwith. Sanctions denied. Plaintiff's request for relief denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PHA/PB) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600

Motion To Vacate Court Judgment And Entry Of Default.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: August 7, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Josephine Haywood's motion to set aside default and default judgment, and for leave to defend this action.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ken Moss, Esq. & David Kritzer, Esq. appeared via telephone for plaintiff and responding party Wells Fargo Bank, N. A., a National Banking Association.
Gordon D. Greenwood, Esq. & Michael T. Stewart, Esq. appeared for defendant and moving party Josephine Haywood, who was not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendant and moving party Josephine Haywood's motion. The default entered December 19, 2007, and the Court judgment entered April 17, 2008, are hereby set aside, and leave to defend this action is granted.

Order was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. a National Banking Association.
No appearance by defendant Josephine Haywood.
Default entered against defendant on December 19, 2007.
Order granting plaintiff's request for waiver of witness appearance at default prove-up hearing filed March 13, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on December 19, 2007.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. a National Banking Association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Josephine Haywood as follows:

Damages/Principal - $153,417.88.
Prejudgment Interest - $16,181.55.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $393.00, for a total of $172,817.43.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Continued To Mar-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
